name: normal my-score view hides archived events
description: 验证默认我的成绩视图会过滤 archived 赛事，避免长期残留的历史赛混进当前查询。

INSERT INTO player_accounts (id, player_id, platform_id, account_key, account_name, account_display_name, is_primary, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (201, 1, (SELECT id FROM platforms WHERE code = '2048verse'), 'alpha_score', 'alpha_score', 'Alpha', 1, '{}', '2026-05-03 09:00:00', '2026-05-03 09:00:00');
